name: worklog_workspace_today
description: Today's git workspace activity: repos touched today, notable files, and your git commits. Same as `worklog today`. Pass one or more workspace roots.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: One or more workspace roots. Empty: GIT_PATH or ~/git.

max_repos.title: Max Repos
max_repos.description: Global cap on active repos deep-scanned across all workspaces.

recent_repos_count.title: Recent Repos Count
recent_repos_count.description: Recent top-level dirs per workspace for fallback context.

include_scratch_dirs.title: Include Scratch Dirs
include_scratch_dirs.description: Include @* scratch directories when matching active repos.
